Container.Name: librariarr
Container.Overview: Librariarr is a media library management webapp for Plex, Jellyfin, and Emby servers. It provides filterable library browsing, a lifecycle rule engine for automated media management, and syncs media metadata from connected servers.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: plex jellyfin emby media library management lifecycle
Container.Description: Librariarr is a media library management webapp for Plex, Jellyfin, and Emby servers. It provides filterable library browsing, a lifecycle rule engine for automated media management, and syncs media metadata from connected servers.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL database (included via companion container or external)

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. If using the companion librariarr-db container, use its hostname.

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for session encryption. Leave empty to auto-generate and persist in /config.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent config directory for backups, image cache, and session data

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (default: 99 for Unraid nobody user)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (default: 100 for Unraid users group)
